name: generate_parallel_reports
full_help:
generate_parallel_reports

Description: 
Generate reports in parallel

Syntax: 
generate_parallel_reports  [-quiet] [-verbose] <reports>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <reports>   list of report commands

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
